normalization_rules: A version highlight is expanded only to exact Eco-G powertrain and gearbox states printed on the same official version page.
The two official Eco-G automatic states are added to the active catalogue because the official version pages explicitly name their trim, powertrain, automatic gearbox and catalogue price.
Only catalogue prices printed beside the exact Eco-G 120 powertrain and gearbox are imported.
Broad equipment pages are retained as supporting evidence but are not flattened blindly because they mix standard equipment, packages, technical qualifiers and potentially engine-dependent entries.
A package or option is not mapped to the new automatic configuration without an exact state-level price and applicability observation.
Financing, promotions, accessories, installation charges and dealer-stock prices are excluded from catalogue-price imports.
